name: Italian Love Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 box chocolate cake mix (I use the choc. with choc. pudding type)
recipeInstructions:
Prepare the cake mix according to package directions and pour into a prepared 9 x 13 pan. Beat together until well mixed: sugar, eggs, vanilla, and cheese. Spoon onto the cake batter and spread with a knife. Bake at 350°F for 60 minutes. As the cake bakes, the cheese filling will sink to the bottom.
ICING:
Beat together the pudding, milk, and powdered sugar. Fold in the Cool Whip and spread over the cooled cake.
